_comment: Curation overlay for streamdock-apple-music-touchbar (v1 of A/B pair with streamdock-applemusic-touchbar).

ab_pair.trigger: AutoBuilder data-interpretation amendments between v1 and v2 runs
ab_pair.note: First-attempt delivery of the streamdock-applemusic prompt. The output was off enough that the user enacted AutoBuilder amendments and re-ran the prompt; that re-run is the streamdock-applemusic-touchbar build (note the slug contraction from 'apple-music' to 'applemusic'). Pair semantic: same prompt, different architecture, measuring delivery-quality delta.

lifecycle_state_rationale: v1 of an A/B pair where the user found the delivery "off" enough to enact AutoBuilder amendments and re-run the same prompt. Per promotion-semantics rule: gates 1+2 reflect user experience; if v1 was unacceptable (and the re-run is proof of that), the user cannot honestly attest gate 2. v1 stays in corpus as the measurement-against-prior-architecture, not as a ratifiable artifact.
